ground_truth.title: Travel Weekly Hotel and Resort News and Feature Articles
ground_truth.main_content:
Hotels

Guestroom remodel is completed at MGM Grand Las Vegas
The redesign was done to give the rooms a brighter, airier feel and added features like walk-in showers, lighted closets and...

Ocean Signature Resorts debuts adults-only Ocean Allure Costa Mujeres
The all-inclusive property features upscale suites with a wide range of dining options.

When does Jamaica expect tourism to fully recover? Not until after 2026
Jamaica tourism officials attending a New York event said they expect visitor arrivals will rebound to approximately 80% of...

Exclusive Resorts is acquiring luxury vacation club Inspirato
Inspirato will be taken private in the $59 million all-cash transaction.

Restored Swiss hotel Chesa Marchetta will open in January
The seasonal property in the Engadin Valley, not far from the Italy border, consists of 13 rooms, a three-bedroom rental house...

Grand Canyon South Rim hotels reopen after water line repair
The National Park Service had closed the hotels on Dec. 6 due to a series of breaks in the Transcanyon Waterline.

Spain fines Airbnb for advertising unlicensed rentals
Airbnb said that it plans to challenge the fine in court.

Turks and Caicos resort to be part of Hilton's LXR collection
Amaris Grace Bay is expected to open in 2028 along Grace Bay Beach.

The Last Resort: Saffire Freycinet and Flockhill Lodge
Karen Urosevich, founder of Well Placed Travel, offers tips on navigating off-the-beaten-path destinations and talks about...

Suppliers, sellers, pavilions and pinky promises at ILTM
Although she is only in her fourth year as a travel advisor, Stacy King has made an impression on luxury suppliers.
